title: Web UX Test Environment
description: Environment and runtime configuration for a web UX test plan. Never contains credentials or secrets.

name.description: Logical environment name, e.g. local, dev, staging.

base_url.description: Base URL the plan runs against. May be ${ENV_VAR} for indirection.

stage.description: Deployment stage. production gates destructive actions.

auth.description: Authentication policy. Credentials themselves are supplied out-of-band (env vars / secret manager) and must never appear here.

strategy.description: How auth is established. storage_state reuses a saved Playwright session.

storage_state_path.description: Path to a Playwright storageState JSON file (gitignored). Used when strategy is storage_state.

username_env.description: Name of the environment variable holding the username (not the value).

password_env.description: Name of the environment variable holding the password (not the value).

destructive_actions_allowed.description: Whether the plan may perform create/update/delete against this environment.
